user_request: Emergency rite: stellar cartography update requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: stellar cartography update requires operation

### TOPIC
stellar cartography update

### COMPONENT
stellar cartography update

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- stellar cartography update
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hark! The stellar cartography update demands sacred operation!
Congregation: We genuflect before the stellar cartography update and its mysteries.
Priest: First, synchronize the astrographic databases with the beacon-stars of old.
Congregation: Second, recalibrate the stellar cartography update's navigational matrices.
Priest: Third, invoke the operation upon the stellar cartography update with blessed oils and incantations.
Congregation: By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let the operation commence!

user_request: Blessing for the vox-caster during tuning
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the vox-caster during tuning

### TOPIC
vox-caster tuning

### COMPONENT
vox-caster

### OPERATION
tuning

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- vox-caster
- tuning

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed vox-caster, sing forth thy holy frequencies!
Congregation: Grant us the tuning of this vox-caster by the Machine Spirit's grace.
Priest: First, anoint the vox-caster's crystalline resonance chambers with sacred unguent.
Congregation: Second, attune the vox-caster's transmission coils to the Emperor's own blessed wavelength.
Priest: Third, perform the tuning ritual with fervent prayer and calibrated precision.
Congregation: The vox-caster shall sing in perfect harmony eternal!

user_request: Rite request: operation on long-range vox transmission
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on long-range vox transmission

### TOPIC
long-range vox transmission

### COMPONENT
long-range vox transmission

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- long-range vox transmission
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Omnissiah, bless this long-range vox transmission with thy divine operation!
Congregation: We consecrate the long-range vox transmission unto the sacred rite.
Priest: First, purify the amplification matrices of the long-range vox transmission through ablative prayer.
Congregation: Second, execute the operation upon all relay nodes with meticulous adherence to the Codex Mechanicus.
Priest: Third, restore the long-range vox transmission's signal coherence through harmonic resonance.
Congregation: Let the operation bind the void itself to our sacred purpose!

user_request: Prayer for activation of the data-slate
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for activation of the data-slate

### TOPIC

### COMPONENT
data-slate

### OPERATION
activation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- data-slate
- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Awaken, data-slate, from thy dormant slumber!
Congregation: We seek the activation of this blessed data-slate through sacred rite.
Priest: First, cleanse the data-slate's photoreactive surface with blessed solvent and devotion.
Congregation: Second, perform the activation sequence whilst chanting the Litany of the Blessed Circuits.
Priest: Third, restore the data-slate's logical processes through the operation of sacred diagnostics.
Congregation: By the Omnissiah's infinite knowledge, let the data-slate arise!

Congregation: Second, invoke the operation upon the sonar pulse emission with blessed benediction.

Congregation: The Machine Spirit shall guide the sonar pulse emission true!

user_request: My Chimera is failing during transmission check — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My Chimera is failing during transmission check — help

### TOPIC
Chimera transmission check

### COMPONENT
Chimera

### OPERATION
transmission check

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Chimera
- transmission check

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Chimera, stalwart transport of the Mechanicus, hear our supplication!
Congregation: We perform the transmission check upon this noble Chimera with sacred rite.
Priest: First, inspect the Chimera's drive-shaft bearings for profane wear and degradation.
Congregation: Second, execute the transmission check on all hydraulic systems of the Chimera.
Priest: Third, anoint the Chimera's gearbox with blessed lubricant and restore mechanical harmony.
Congregation: The Chimera shall roll forth in righteous service!

Congregation: Second, perform the operation on the servitor crane's hydraulic actuators with blessed precision.

prayer:

Congregation: Second, perform the sealing ritual upon the emergency bulkhead's mechanical locks with blessed fervor.

user_request: Rite request: protocol on autodoc emergency
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: protocol on autodoc emergency

### TOPIC
autodoc emergency protocol

### COMPONENT
autodoc emergency

### OPERATION
protocol

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- autodoc emergency
- protocol

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hear now the sacred protocol of the autodoc emergency, that the Machine Spirit may guide our hands in dire necessity.
Congregation: We invoke the autodoc emergency, blessed apparatus of salvation, hear our supplication.
Priest: First, disengage the corrupted subroutines and perform diagnostic purification upon the autodoc emergency's primary circuits.
Congregation: By protocol we sanctify, by protocol we restore, the autodoc emergency shall answer our call.
Priest: Second, initiate the blessed protocol of manual override, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon each servo-actuator.
Congregation: The autodoc emergency stands ready, its Machine Spirit awakened to our need.
Priest: Third, calibrate the medicae dispensers through sacred protocol, that life-essence may flow true and uncontaminated.
Congregation: Blessed be the protocol, blessed be the autodoc emergency, blessed be the Machine Spirits eternal.
